summary: Ventas POS refresh endpoint and frontend Actualizar button testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed. All 20 frontend features verified working. The /api/ventas-pos/refresh endpoint correctly returns 503 when ODOO_MODULE_BASE_URL is empty (expected behavior), and the frontend handles this gracefully with error toast without losing table data.

backend_api.POST /api/ventas-pos/refresh 503 for emp: PASS - Returns 503 with 'ODOO_MODULE_BASE_URL no configurada' message
backend_api.POST /api/ventas-pos/refresh with date p: PASS - Accepts desde/hasta but still returns 503
backend_api.GET /api/ventas-pos paginated for empres: PASS - Returns {data, total, page, page_size, total_pages, max_date_order}
backend_api.GET /api/ventas-pos MISSING_ODOO_COMPANY: PASS - Returns error_code with empty data
backend_api.GET /api/ventas-pos pagination page 1 vs: PASS - Different data returned per page

frontend_ui.Actualizar button text: PASS - Shows 'Actualizar' text (not old sync button names)
frontend_ui.Date filters work: PASS - Changing fecha_desde loads different data (21→4747 records)
frontend_ui.Tab switching: PASS - All tabs (Pendientes, Confirmadas, Credito, Descartadas, Todas) clickable
frontend_ui.Pagination controls: PASS - Shows 'Mostrando X-Y de Z' with navigation
frontend_ui.Actualizar click shows 503 error: PASS - Error toast shown about ODOO/configuration
frontend_ui.Table data preserved after error: PASS - Data NOT lost after Actualizar error
frontend_ui.Product lines modal: PASS - Opens with 'Detalles de Productos', shows marca/tipo badges
frontend_ui.Pagination navigation: PASS - Next button navigates to different page data

test_credentials.ODOO_MODULE_BASE_URL: EMPTY (intentional - Odoo module not yet configured)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing Odoo data in PostgreSQL odoo schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ventas POS refresh endpoint tested. ODOO_MODULE_BASE_URL is intentionally empty so /api/ventas-pos/refresh always returns 503 - this is EXPECTED behavior. Frontend handles 503 gracefully with error toast. All existing POS functionality (pagination, filters, tabs, lineas, pagos) still works. empresa_id=6 has company_key='Ambission'. When ODOO_MODULE_BASE_URL is eventually configured, the refresh endpoint will proxy to the Odoo module for sync.
